channel.title: www.postguam.com - RSS Results in sports of type article
channel.description: www.postguam.com - RSS Results in section(s) sports only for asset type(s) of article

item.title: The Angels finished in last place again. How does owner Arte Moreno plan to fix it?
item.description: LOS ANGELES - The standings spoke for themselves, but Angels management wanted you to know they had comprehended the lesson.
item.dc:creator: Bill Shaikin | The Los Angeles Times

item.title: Believe the hype. Jacory Croskey-Merritt is already a success story
item.description: In the middle of the University of Arizona’s 2024 football season, a veteran coach took an ineligible player for a walk around the practice field in Tucson. Jacory Croskey-Merritt had played one game for the Wildcats that fall. He wowed…
item.dc:creator: Barry Svrluga | The Washington Post

item.title: Thou shalt not steal baseballs and hats from kids
item.description: Grown people of Earth, hear me: You don’t need that home run ball that lands in your section. Nor that hat from your favorite tennis player.
item.dc:creator: Candace Buckner | The Washington Post

item.title: Adam Silver says NBA needs clear evidence Clippers made secret deal before lowering boom on Ballmer
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver on Wednesday pulled back as allegations swirled about the Clippers circumventing the salary cap by orchestrating an endorsement deal for star forward Kawhi Leonard.
item.dc:creator: Steve Henson | Los Angeles Times

item.title: Pros show out for Guam Elite Basketball Camp
item.description: Guam Elite Basketball held its Future Camp and Classic on Saturday, Sept. 6 at Tiyan High School where local kids 8 and up were given the opportunity to train with international basketball pros Joseph Lin and Jason Brickman as well…
item.dc:creator: Daily Post Staff

item.title: Astros’ Taylor Trammell has (technically) illegal bat confiscated after Yankees request inspection
item.description: The Yankees’ 8-4 win on Thursday was pushed back by several minutes, as Aaron Boone asked umpires to inspect Taylor Trammell’s bat in the ninth inning following a double from the Astros’ outfielder.
item.dc:creator: Gary Phillips | New York Daily News

item.title: Clippers considered naming dome after bankrupt firm at center of Kawhi Leonard allegations
item.description: More details are emerging about a company that allegedly paid Los Angeles Clippers star Kawhi Leonard millions to circumvent the NBA’s salary cap, including that the team came close in 2021 to granting naming rights for its Inglewood arena to…
item.dc:creator: Steve Henson | Los Angeles Times

item.title: How rookie defensive tackle Elijah Williams, the Vikings’ unlikeliest player, made the team
item.description: Vikings defensive tackle Elijah Williams was not among the 329 players invited to the NFL scouting combine. He was not among 257 players selected in this year’s NFL draft. He was not among 18 undrafted rookies the Vikings guaranteed money…
item.dc:creator: Andrew Krammer | The Minnesota Star Tribune

item.title: Guam Elite Basketball Future Camp and Classic opens this weekend
item.description: This weekend, Guam Elite Basketball tips off its Future Camp and Classic at Tiyan High School, offering Guam youth an opportunity to hone their skills with three of the world’s preeminent basketball talents - Terry Holt III, Jason Brickman, and…

item.title: Peyton Manning on potential for Bo Nix sophomore slump: ‘He’s made of the right stuff’
item.description: DENVER - Peyton Manning cried when he retired, but his tears paled in comparison to those shed by Broncos Country over his successors.
item.dc:creator: Troy Renck | The Denver Post

item.title: Josh Sargent hasn’t scored for the USMNT in 6 years, but he’s a prolific striker for his club
item.description: PHILADELPHIA - Josh Sargent’s track record as a striker is so odd that sometimes it just doesn’t make sense.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Tannenwald | The Philadelphia Inquirer

item.title: Stephen A. Smith is ready to talk politics: ‘I will spare no one’
item.description: Stephen A. Smith has had plenty to say about sports on the air for decades. In recent years he has stretched his commentary into politics and culture. Starting Sept. 17, he will expand further as the host of a weekly…
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Barr | The Washington Post

item.title: MLB Relief Pitcher of the Year Award honors an essential role - just ask the LA Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES - No role in baseball has undergone more of a transformation than that of a relief pitcher. What once was something a hurler became because he wasn't good enough to be a starter is now a vital role…
item.dc:creator: Steve Henson | The Los Angeles Times

item.title: Jake Moody’s latest misses should seal his 49ers’ fate
item.description: SANTA CLARA. Calif. - Jake Moody missed another kick on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dieter Kurtenbach | The Mercury News

item.title: Will QB Luke Altmyer rise to the occasion, who will step up at WR?
item.description: CHICAGO - In the middle of a recent media briefing, while running through injury updates and practice plans, Illinois football coach Bret Bielema paused to offer thanks to students.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Kane | Chicago Tribune

item.title: Are the Cowboys and Commanders vulnerable as the New York Giants hope for early upsets?
item.description: NEW YORK - The New York Giants went 0-6 in the NFC East last season. They’re 0-2 against Washington Commanders MVP candidate Jayden Daniels. And they’ve lost 15 of their last 16 games against the Dallas Cowboys, including the last…
item.dc:creator: Pat Leonard | The Dallas Morning News

item.title: Gavin McKenna and Drew Allar could become Sidney Crosby and Ben Roethlisberger 2.0
item.description: PITTSBURGH - A little more than two decades ago, a pair of draft picks made 15 months apart changed the trajectory of Pittsburgh sports.
item.dc:creator: Jason Mackey | Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

item.title: Deion Sanders’ Colorado Buffaloes are bigger than ever, but are they better? Georgia Tech will tell us plenty
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. - Is this Costco or CU-stco? Because nobody in Big 12 football has imported more sheer bulk than Deion Sanders has for 2025.
item.dc:creator: Sean Keeler | The Denver Post

item.title: Roman Wilson has been a great story, but the Steelers can't let it affect their thinking at WR
item.description: PITTSBURGH - Roman Wilson left the Steelers' first padded practice last year on a cart, the first detour during a frustrating rookie season.
item.dc:creator: Jason Mackey | Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

item.title: Chicago Bears face a long drive to get passage of stadium legislation in the fall
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Ill. - The Chicago Bears’ playbook for constructing a new domed stadium and football entertainment complex in Arlington Heights calls for state lawmakers to act in October to approve property tax break legislation that would allow them to break…
item.dc:creator: Rick Pearson, Jeremy Gorner, and Olivia Olander | Chicago Tribune
